propositions: The code-review sidecar persists only surfaced findings (blocking/advisory/coaching) and omits the dropped and indeterminate buckets produced by Pass-3.
The sidecar does not persist the resolved block_threshold/blocking_enabled each finding was judged against, so the complete Pass-1 finding list is not recoverable.
Extend the sidecar to code_review_result_v2 pooling all four buckets (blocking, advisory, dropped, indeterminate), each finding retaining verification, Pass-3 decision, and resolved thresholds.
code_review_coach must forward dropped/indeterminate from the decide step into the terminal verdict dict, requiring schema and workflow yaml wiring changes.
The reader (latest_code_review_result) must accept both v1 and v2 schemas so old records still read and the surfaced-findings reader keeps returning the blocking+advisory union.
Code review has no overflow bucket unlike plan-review, and code-review findings carry no evidence/scenarios fields.
